## Tool Name
<!-- e.g., YAML to JSON Converter, Base32 Encoder -->

## Description
<!-- What does this tool do? Why is it useful for developers? -->

## Client-Side Feasibility
<!-- ZeroTools are 100% client-side. Can this tool be built without a backend? Are there reliable CDN libraries (like cdnjs) that can handle the logic? -->

## Expected UI / Inputs
<!-- Describe the expected layout. What are the inputs? What are the options/toggles? -->
- Input: 
- Options:
- Output: 

## Similar Existing Tools
<!-- Link to existing tools online that do this (so we can build a faster, ad-free version). -->
